<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage; use function dirname; use SebastianBergmann\Version as VersionId; final class Version { private static string $version = ''; public static function id(): string { if (self::$version === '') { self::$version = (new VersionId('11.0.12', dirname(__DIR__)))->asString(); } return self::$version; } }
